I used AI to improve my planning and task management process across multiple apps. One of the recommended apps is Akiflow, and it's a great step toward helping me better plan my tasks and track all my apps. In a short period of usage, it's opened my eyes to how much is on my list and should go away, how much is unplanned, and ensured that I have a realistic daily plan!

Daniel R.
I really enjoy using Akiflow because it helps me bring structure and clarity into my day in one place. What I like most is the combination of calendar, tasks, and planning flow […]. One of the biggest advantages for me is the chat experience. I can throw in words, tasks, or ideas very quickly, and it helps organize them for me without forcing me to stop and think through every small step manually. […]

Natalie
What I like best about Akiflow is that it lets me manage both my calendar and tasks in one focused workspace. As a productivity enthusiast who values efficiency and clarity in task management, Akiflow has truly elevated the way I organize my work. I especially love the quick capture feature. It allows me to instantly add tasks or events anytime, anywhere. […] And the built-in AI assistant is just brilliant.

changelog.title: Changelog - Akiflow
changelog.text:
Changelog - Akiflow
Powered by Featurebase
Akiflow
Log in with Akiflow account
Feedback
Changelog
Changelog
Follow new updates and improvements to Akiflow
.
Subscribe to updates
June 25th, 2026
2.76
☀️ Akiflow Summer Release
This is our biggest release of the year. Akiflow now connects directly to your AI assistant, lets you break work into subtasks, gives you a new view on Mobile with Daily Dashboard, and can auto-optimize schedule for you. On top of four major features, this build adds Someday page improvements and more than 100 fixes across desktop, and mobile.
Note on availability:
We are rolling these features out progressively to keep things stable. If you have updated to 2.76 and do not see a new feature yet, it is on its way. It can take up to a week for everyone to get full access.
🔌 Akiflow MCP - the task manager your AI can control
Akiflow now ships a hosted MCP server at
mcp.akiflow.com
, so the AI you already use can manage your Akiflow directly.
Control Akiflow in natural language
- Connect Claude or any MCP-compatible AI client to Akiflow and manage your tasks, calendar, and schedule by just asking.
Full task control
- Create, edit, plan, and reschedule tasks, straight from your AI.
Calendar and time blocking
- Create and edit events and time slots, manage multiple calendars, and invite guests, all through your assistant.
Read your day
- Ask for your schedule across any date range and get tasks, events, and time slots back in your own time zone.
Meeting transcripts
- Pull your meeting transcripts into your AI workflow.
Secure by design
- Connections use OAuth, so you stay in control of what your AI can access.
✅ Subtasks
You can now break big tasks into smaller subtasks, on both Desktop and Mobile.
Native parent and child tasks
- Split any task into subtasks instead of burying steps inside a description.
Schedule each subtask independently
- Drag individual subtasks onto your calendar and work through a large task across your week.
Progress at a glance
- Parent tasks show a live progress counter (for example 2/5) so you always know how much is left.
Smart completion and deletion
- When you finish or delete a parent with open subtasks, Akiflow asks what you want to do with the subtask so nothing gets lost.
🌅 Daily Dashboard
A new home for your day on mobile, powered by AI. Akiflow now gives you a reason to check in throughout the day.
Three daily briefs
- A Morning Brief, a Midday Brief, and an end-of-day Wrap-up summarize what is ahead and what you got done.
Live Activity
- A glanceable section keeps your current and upcoming items front and center.
Aki Feed
- A single feed brings your briefs and updates together, sorted most-recent-first with automatic archiving so it stays clean.
Control your briefs
- Turn each daily brief on or off and adjust its timing from the Workflows settings on desktop.
⚡ Schedule Optimizer
Stop dragging tasks around one by one. Akiflow can now replan your day for you, on Desktop and Web.
Instant scheduling
- Drop an unscheduled task into the next available slot in your day with a single click.
Optimize Schedule
- When a task runs long (or short), Akiflow offers to replan the rest of your day automatically, keeping your tasks in order and fitting them into the time you have left.
Works as you rearrange
- Dragging a task over others pushes the following tasks down and reflows your schedule, so a change in plans takes one move instead of many.
🖥️ Desktop
New
New planning views
- Plan your tasks across dedicated This Week, This Month, and Someday views, now alongside Inbox and Today, so you can organize work by time horizon instead of scrolling one long list.
Reorganized planning sidebar
- The sidebar in the planning views now keeps Inbox, Someday, This Week, and This Month always within reach
Copy transcript summary only
- In the menu you can now copy just the summary, separately from the full transcript.
Rename your meeting transcript bot
- Set a custom name for your Meeting Assistant bot.
Rich-text formatting shortcuts
- Added keyboard shortcuts for common formatting (strikethrough and lists) in task and event descriptions.
Toggle weekends with Shift+W
- A new keyboard shortcut shows or hides weekends in the calendar.
Events & Calendar
Closing a recurring all-day event popup no longer incorrectly prompts you to save.
The "This Week" planner now shows the footer panel.
Fixed weekly calendar navigation jumping to the wrong date range after several week transitions.
Hidden weekends no longer reappear on their own when navigating between months.
The Save button now appears correctly after editing a conference location or event description.
Tasks
Picking "Someday" when adding a task now stays selected as you keep typing.
Fixed the task title disappearing when a long project name was assigned.
Added spacing between tags and project labels in the task popup for easier reading.
Integrations & Sync
Keyboard shortcuts (Cmd+K, Cmd+F and others) now work when a non-Latin input method such as Korean, Japanese, or Chinese is active.
The in-app support widget no longer resurfaces old conversations as new messages after an app update.
Platform & Reliability
Made the running app version easier to find in Settings.
Fixed a range of rare crashes across the planner, calendar, date pickers, sharing availability, and drag-and-drop, for a more stable experience.
Reduced background error noise so the app stays responsive.
📱 Mobile
New
Redesigned Upcoming widget
- The Upcoming home screen widget has a cleaner, easier-to-read layout.
Show completed tasks in the widget
- A new option lets you include completed tasks in the Upcoming widget.
New Weekdays view
- Added a Weekdays view with a refreshed calendar view-options menu.
Copy transcript summary only
- Copy just the meeting summary from the three-dot menu.
Rename your meeting transcript bot
- Give your meeting assistant bot a custom name.
Events & Calendar
Fixed date-only items shifting by a day in some time zones.
Dragging a recurring task no longer creates incorrect exceptions or duplicate tasks.
Removing recurrence from a recurring task or event now behaves correctly.
Discarding changes to a time slot now works as expected.
Tasks & Chat
Links in Aki Chat are tappable again.
Tapping a task link that is not a valid URL no longer crashes the app.
Task labels are no longer lost after syncing.
The app icon badge count is now accurate.
Bug Fixes
Fixed several startup and resume crashes and reduced out-of-memory app terminations.
Fixed various other rare crashes for better overall stability.
🌐 Web App
Personalized in-app messages can now open with a relevant first message when you start a chat from a specific call to action.
Fixed a Safari service worker redirect issue affecting some sessions.
The billing page now clearly shows a notice when a payment has failed.
As always, your feedback helps us keep improving. Let us know what you think! 🙏
Post comment
11
🔥
5
🎉
3
🎊
Write a comment
...
June 10th, 2026
Release 2.75
🛡️ Rock-Solid Stability, Smarter Planning & 80+ Fixes
A reliability-focused release with 80+ quality fixes across desktop, mobile, web, and backend, plus handy planning upgrades like one-click "Someday" and a smoother mobile experience.
🖥️ Desktop
New
"Someday" in the Plan menu
- Plan a task to Someday in a single click, right alongside Today, Tomorrow, This week, and more, with no typing needed.
Reliability
Fixed high CPU and memory usage that could slow the app during normal use.
Resolved the app repeatedly signaling an update when none was available.
The update button now appears reliably, and updates delivered through the service worker are detected correctly, including when switching release channels.
Multiple crash fixes across startup, the calendar, the tray window, chat, and event saving for a more stable session.
Improved stats page performance with faster loading times and several bug fixes for a smoother, more reliable experience.
📱 Mobile
New
Auto-dismiss Live Activity
- The Lock Screen and Dynamic Island Live Activity now disappears automatically once every task in a time slot is complete, instead of lingering until the slot ends.
Faster drag-and-drop reordering
- Tasks now reorder instantly when you drag them, with no more 1 to 2 second delay before the new order appears.
Tasks
Restoring a task on desktop no longer leaves a stale "Restore" button and deleted timestamp showing on mobile.
The project section is no longer cut off in the task modal when the project lives inside a folder.
Fixed cramped spacing in the task modal footer when properties wrap onto a second line.
The "Someday" filter in the all-task list now correctly shows your Someday tasks instead of scheduled ones.
On Android, dragged tasks now land at the intended position right away and no longer snap into nearby time slots.
Removed the stray character counter on the time slot title field.
Task titles that start with numbers are no longer turned into clickable phone number links.
Tasks created on mobile are no longer locked to a connected calendar when the lock option is turned off.
Events & Calendar
The Meeting Assistant button now appears for events that already have a transcript, and no longer shows on events that have not happened yet.
Aki & Chat
Switching accounts now loads the correct Aki chat list instead of showing the previous account's chats.
Aki chat list now loads noticeably faster.
Fixed an unexpected scroll-to-bottom button appearing when opening the keyboard in a chat with a document notification.
UI
Fixed the half-opaque top bar on Android so it now displays correctly.
Refreshed, more consistent headers
- Headers, section titles, and icons have been standardized across the app for a cleaner, more consistent look.
Reliability
30+ crash and stability fixes, including better recovery after the app resumes, more resilient database and sync error handling, fewer search crashes, and more reliable task save, reorder, and undo.
🌐 Web App
Authenticated pages such as Account are no longer accessible through the browser back button after logging out.
🔧 Backend & Infrastructure
Fixed an issue where editing tasks could fail with server errors, so task changes now save reliably.
Meeting Assistant can now be turned off again after your free transcripts are used up.
Daily briefs are more reliable: the mid-day brief opens with its check-in sentence under the correct heading, and the wrap-up brief now sends on schedule.
Morning workflows now run once at their scheduled time instead of firing multiple times.
More reliable subscription cancellation and billing retries.
Google Calendar sync is now faster and more reliable for accounts with a large number of events.
As always, your feedback helps us keep improving. Let us know what you think! 🙏
Post comment
2
🔥
1
💯
1
🎉
Write a comment
...
May 27th, 2026
Release 2.74
A Faster, Cleaner Akiflow Experience
Smarter lock defaults, improved chat experience, and 90+ bug fixes across desktop and mobile.
🖥️ Desktop
Improvements
Notification badge count is now capped at 99+
The support widget now closes when clicking outside it
Default auto-lock for tasks and time slots is now off, aligning desktop and mobile behavior
Unread count now shows channels with unread messages instead of total messages, reducing noise
Events & Calendar
Availability slots no longer show incorrect end times
Duplicated availability slots now save correctly and display a valid URL
Infinite scroll loop in the week calendar view on Mac Safari fixed
Organizer RSVP response now saves correctly when adding guests for the first time
Tasks
Creating a new tag on a task no longer adds duplicate tags to the left menu panel
Bold links now render correctly in task descriptions
Integrations & Sync
WhatsApp country code selection now works correctly for US (+1) and Russia
Aki on WhatsApp connectivity issues resolved
Platform & Reliability
Excessive CPU and memory usage on web and desktop resolved
Tray icon now opens when clicked
Keyboard shortcuts now work correctly on Web (macOS)
Multiple crash fixes across settings, popups, notifications, and calendar views
📱 Mobile
Improvements
Default auto-lock for tasks and time slots is now off, matching the desktop behavior
Inactive chats are now excluded from the unread count
Keyboard now hides correctly when scrolling in chat list view
Bottom sheets now show a backdrop overlay
Bottom sections UI has been refreshed
Events & Calendar
Cancelled or deleted events on iOS no longer trigger notifications
Google Calendar import no longer shows an error during onboarding
Calendar selection is now consistent between desktop and mobile
Live activity cards now update correctly in the background
Time slot title input now enforces the 255 character limit
Tasks & Chat
Transcript modal now shows the correct date
Logout no longer hangs on a loading icon or breaks account settings
Siri can now be enabled in-app after initially denying permission during onboarding
Editing a recurring task instance no longer creates duplicates
Chat background fixed for iOS 26+
Bug Fixes
Real-time sync for tasks and events is now more reliable
Pusher event delivery improvements for more consistent updates
Sync improvements on app open
Reduced duplicate Aki Feed refresh requests
20+ additional crash and stability fixes across the mobile app
As always, your feedback helps us keep improving. Let us know what you think! 🙏

Release 2.73
🛡️ Reliability, In-App Support & Quality Fixes

New
The "Overdue" label now uses clearer wording
Users are now alerted if the desktop app on MacOS is not running from the Applications folder

integrations.title: Centralize Your Productivity Hub With Integrations - Akiflow
integrations.text:
Centralize Your Productivity Hub With Integrations - Akiflow
Why Akiflow?
Akiflow For
Resources
Your Team
Pricing
Log in
Try for free
Connect all your tools with Akiflow
2-Way Sync, Flawless Native Integrations, Engineered with Cutting-Edge Performance and an Unwavering Commitment to Speed.
Featured integrations
Slack
Transform Slack messages into actionable tasks instantly, ensuring nothing slips through the cracks

Gmail
Convert your emails into tasks directly from Gmail, helping you stay organized and focused

Notion
Import tasks from Notion and manage them in one place, simplifying your project tracking

Asana
Integrate Asana tasks seamlessly, making it easy to keep track of your projects and deadlines

ClickUp
Sync tasks from ClickUp to Akiflow, enhancing your project management efficiency

Zoom
Schedule and manage Zoom meetings effortlessly, directly from your Akiflow calendar

Google Calendar
Consolidate all your events and tasks in one view with Google Calendar integration

Trello
Manage Trello tasks within Akiflow, streamlining your project workflows

Todoist
Bring your Todoist tasks into Akiflow for a unified task management experience

Jira
Synchronize Jira issues with Akiflow, ensuring your development tasks are always up-to-date and accessible.

Github
Integrate GitHub issues with Akiflow, ensuring your coding tasks are managed efficiently

Microsoft Teams
Convert Microsoft Teams messages into tasks, keeping your team collaboration organized

Outlook Calendar
Keep your Outlook Calendar in sync with Akiflow for seamless schedule management

Outlook Email
Turn Outlook emails into tasks, maintaining a clear and actionable inbox

analysis.name: Akiflow
analysis.tagline: One app for tasks & calendars powered by AI
analysis.value_proposition: A unified time-blocking planner that combines calendar, tasks, universal inbox, and an AI assistant to help professionals plan and execute their day.
analysis.ideal_customer: Founders, C-levels, operators, and 'obsessed doers' — busy professionals who want to save 2 hours a day by consolidating calendars, tasks, and integrations.

features.name: time blocking
features.description: Automatically time-block tasks and events on a single calendar view.

features.name: unified calendar
features.description: Sync work and personal calendars into one view.
features.evidence_quote: One calendar that syncs Work & Life

features.name: task manager
features.description: Task management with Someday, This Week, This Month, and Today views.

features.name: universal inbox
features.description: Aggregates tasks and messages from multiple integrated tools in one inbox.
features.evidence_quote: The Universal Inbox — All your work, captured and organized

features.name: ai executive assistant
features.description: 'Aki' AI assistant that plans, prioritizes, and schedules on demand.

features.name: 2-way sync
features.description: Bidirectional sync with connected tools like Todoist, Asana, ClickUp, etc.

features.name: email to task
features.description: Convert Gmail or Outlook emails into tasks in one click.
features.evidence_quote: Emails into tasks in one click

features.name: slack message to task
features.description: Save Slack messages as tasks to reply later.

features.name: zapier integration
features.description: Automate workflows via Zapier connecting thousands of apps.
features.evidence_quote: Automate your task management by connecting Akiflow with thousands of apps through Zapier

features.name: ifttt integration
features.description: Custom automations via IFTTT.
features.evidence_quote: Create custom automations between Akiflow and other apps with IFTTT

features.name: smart time slots

features.evidence_quote: Smart Time Slots that work around you

features.name: availability sharing
features.description: Share availability slots for team scheduling.

features.name: auto-scheduling
features.description: AI auto-schedules tasks while giving user control.

features.name: recurring tasks
features.description: Handle recurring tasks automatically.

features.name: ai project assignment
features.description: AI automatically assigns projects to captured tasks.

features.name: goal alignment nudges
features.description: AI nudges to keep tasks aligned with stated goals.

features.description: Talk to your schedule; AI executes voice commands.
features.evidence_quote: Voice Commands — Talk to your schedule

features.name: phone calls (coming soon)

features.evidence_quote: Phone Calls — Aki can call you or your contacts. Coming soon

features.name: daily briefings
features.description: Morning, midday, and end-of-day briefings with reminders.
features.evidence_quote: A Morning Brief, a Midday Brief, and an end-of-day Wrap-up

features.name: quick capture

differentiators: Hosted MCP server lets any MCP-compatible AI client (Claude, etc.) directly control tasks and calendar via OAuth
Universal Inbox aggregating tasks from 18+ tools with 2-way sync
Designed in Italy, backed by Y Combinator (S20)
Aki AI executive assistant with voice commands and (upcoming) phone calls
One-click Schedule Optimizer that reflows the entire day automatically

recent_ships.what: Akiflow MCP server — task manager controllable by any MCP-compatible AI (Claude, etc.)
recent_ships.source: Akiflow now ships a hosted MCP server at mcp.akiflow.com, so the AI you already use can manage your Akiflow directly.

recent_ships.what: Subtasks with independent scheduling and progress counters
recent_ships.source: You can now break big tasks into smaller subtasks, on both Desktop and Mobile.

recent_ships.what: Daily Dashboard on mobile with Morning/Midday/Wrap-up briefs and Aki Feed
recent_ships.source: A new home for your day on mobile, powered by AI.

recent_ships.what: Schedule Optimizer — one-click day replanning on Desktop and Web
recent_ships.source: Akiflow can now replan your day for you, on Desktop and Web.

recent_ships.what: New planning views: This Week, This Month, Someday on desktop
recent_ships.source: Plan your tasks across dedicated This Week, This Month, and Someday views.

recent_ships.what: Meeting Assistant improvements — copy summary only, rename transcript bot
recent_ships.source: Copy transcript summary only. Rename your meeting transcript bot.

recent_ships.what: Shift+W keyboard shortcut to toggle weekends
Redesigned Upcoming widget on mobile with completed-task option
recent_ships.source: The Upcoming home screen widget has a cleaner, easier-to-read layout.

praised: 'I have been using the software daily for the last several weeks and have noticed an improvement in my overall productivity.' (Natalie)
'It helps me bring structure and clarity into my day in one place... the combination of calendar, tasks, and planning flow' (Daniel R.)
'The quick capture feature... allows me to instantly add tasks or events anytime, anywhere. And the built-in AI assistant is just brilliant.' (Natalie, G2)
'A great step toward helping me better plan my tasks and track all my apps' (Tim D.)

free_tier.limits: 7-day free trial only, no permanent free tier

tiers.name: Pro Monthly
tiers.headline_inclusions: Unlimited integrations, tasks, meetings; all power features; Aki AI Executive Assistant; 1:1 onboarding

tiers.name: Pro Yearly
tiers.headline_inclusions: All in Pro Monthly, billed yearly at ~44% savings

pricing.notes: Only one product tier (Pro), differentiated by monthly vs yearly billing. Student/researcher and team pricing available via 'get in touch'. 7-day free trial, cancel anytime.
